objective: Create a controlled pilot path for the mobile web and installable PWA experience without treating the product as ready for public launch or app store submission.

decision.reason: The mobile beginner UI, public pages, PWA assets, screenshots, and release evidence gates are documented. Public launch, store submission, native builds, authenticated production smoke, storage, worker, legal, contact, and owner inputs remain blocked.

invitePack.purpose: Provide private invite text, tester safety rules, success metrics, stop rules, and evidence outputs for 3-5 friendly testers before any public launch.

allowedAudience: Design, QA, and store-review preparation users

allowedChannels.purpose: Fastest phone-first trial path for the beginner large-button workflow.
Home-screen install trial for Android Chrome and iOS Safari before store distribution.

allowedCapabilities: Open the beginner mobile home and large action buttons
Switch image/text and video task modes
Open the compact task reminder panel
Review create, assets, stitch, settings, support, privacy, AI disclosure, and account deletion surfaces
Submit pilot feedback from the mobile settings page and review feedback status
Run review-safe dry-run tasks only when the environment keeps real generation disabled
notAllowed: Do not market this as a public production launch
Do not submit to App Store, Google Play, or domestic Android stores from this status
Do not enable paid or public real video generation until worker and persistent storage evidence is complete
Do not store tester passwords, private uploads, signing keys, API keys, or unredacted logs in the repository
Do not mark release blockers resolved from pilot feedback alone

gates.title: Public pages and HTTPS origin
gates.pilotRule: The public origin can be used for an invited pilot only while release blockers still remain active.

gates.title: Beginner mobile UI and notification panel
gates.pilotRule: The notification panel must stay compact on 390px phones and must not cover the bottom navigation.

gates.title: PWA install and offline behavior
gates.pilotRule: Android install and iOS Add to Home Screen should be captured on real devices before using PWA as the main pilot channel.

gates.title: Pilot feedback intake and triage
gates.pilotRule: Every invited pilot should have a visible mobile feedback path and a named human reviewer before testers start.

gates.title: Review-safe login and authenticated smoke
gates.pilotRule: Use a dedicated review-safe account and never commit real credentials.

gates.title: Persistent storage and libTV worker
gates.pilotRule: Keep LIBTV_DEFAULT_DRY_RUN=true until persistent storage and worker smoke evidence are complete.

gates.title: Support, privacy, AI disclosure, and data rights
gates.pilotRule: Do not invite users beyond friendly testers until support contact and legal copy are final enough for real users.

gates.title: Monitoring, rollback, and incident handling
gates.pilotRule: Assign a human owner for same-day rollback and support review before inviting testers.

gates.title: Evidence, privacy, and secret-safety rules
gates.pilotRule: Repository evidence can describe readiness, but private credentials and user assets stay outside the repository.

pilotRunbook: Confirm the pilot audience, date range, support owner, and rollback owner.
Run npm run pilot:readiness and npm run release:check from the app folder.
Keep the pilot limited to mobile web first; enable PWA install only after device install smoke is captured.
Set PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN and CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to https://www.zkraiflow.top in production before authenticated testing.
Create review-safe credentials in the password manager and run authenticated smoke only after the account exists.
Keep LIBTV_DEFAULT_DRY_RUN=true until worker, storage, and real generation evidence are complete.
Collect feedback against the large-button beginner flows, notification panel, install guide, create flow, assets, settings, and legal pages.
Review /api/support/feedback entries daily during the pilot and close issues only after the fix is verified.
Log pilot issues as follow-up work; do not close public-launch or store-submission blockers without matching evidence.
doNotStore: Android keystores or Apple signing material
private user uploads or generated videos
store console screenshots that reveal account, billing, or signing information
